title: ColdWinter
description:
[1.8-1.21+] Freeze your server when no ones playing!

Save power and resources!
body:
# ColdWinter [1.8-1.21+]
Freeze your server when no one's home!

Unload chunks and make the server sleep when no ones on-line. Handy for small servers that might not see constant player activity (hosting for a group of friends, etc).

A spiritual successor of [Hibernate](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/hibernate.4441/) for 1.21 and beyond!


Commands

```
/coldwinter - Toggles freezing on/off.
/coldwinter status - Displays the current freezing status & loaded chunks.
/coldwinter reload - Reloads the ColdWinter configuration.
```
Permissions

```
coldwinter.toggle
```


FAQ:

  Q1: My web-map plugin isn't rendering anymore!? 
  
  - A1: Because we're freezing the server, stuff like dynmap will stop background renders when no-ones online. You could temporarily toggle the plugin and let a render happen.
  


  Q2: "Can’t Keep Up! Is the Server Overloaded?" messages are appearing constantly!?
  
  - A2: This happens, because we're freezing the server (running at a low tickrate). 
     In anycase, using something like [LogCleaner](https://github.com/appztr4ckt/LogCleaner/) would be beneficial to get rid of old logs.
     


  Q3: My server performance monitoring plugin says my TPS is bad!?
  
  - A3: Read A1

[bStats](https://bstats.org/) statistics (which can be disabled inside its configuration for your server).

![bstats graph that shows servers and players](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/coldwinter.svg)


_[Icon background by Dawid Boldys (Canva)](https://www.pexels.com/photo/deer-on-snowfield-at-daytime-745499/)_
